ownership_basis: Official ICE release discloses investment amount and valuation, but not percentage ownership.
evidence_quote: ICE will invest up to $2 billion in Polymarket
rm_impact_reason: Strategic investment from NYSE parent improves institutional credibility, data distribution, and tokenization partnership potential, while preserving regulatory-review needs.
recommended_action: Treat as strong commercial signal; ask for cap table update, investor rights, data-distribution terms, and any regulatory commitments tied to ICE.

ownership_basis: Secondary report says ICE invested for around a 20% stake.
rm_impact_reason: A large strategic stake can materially change governance expectations, institutional distribution, and future banking needs.
recommended_action: Verify percentage ownership from primary company confirmation or updated corporate records before treating as beneficial ownership.

entity_name: Founders Fund; Polychain Capital; General Catalyst; 1789 Capital
ownership_basis: Investor names and prior funding amount reported; individual ownership percentages not disclosed.
evidence_quote: Backers include Founders Fund, Polychain Capital, General Catalyst, and 1789 Capital.
rm_impact_reason: High-quality crypto/VC backers are commercially positive; politically exposed or regulatory-sensitive investors may raise reputational review questions.
recommended_action: Ask customer to classify investor rights, board/advisory seats, side letters, and whether any investors are passive, advisory, or controlling.

ownership_basis: Official release identifies founder and CEO, but does not disclose founder ownership.
evidence_quote: Shayne Coplan, Founder and CEO of Polymarket
rm_impact_reason: Founder-led status is relevant for control-person screening and relationship context; ownership percentage remains unverified.
recommended_action: Screen founder/control person and request current beneficial ownership or control-person schedule.

ownership_basis: Secondary profile says Cohen's GameStop stake was 8.4% as of April 2025; primary proxy/13D verification is required.
evidence_quote: Cohen's stake in Gamestop has decreased ... to 8.4%
rm_impact_reason: Founder-like activist control person with material equity stake can drive strategy, financing, and acquisition behavior.
recommended_action: Verify current stake in SEC proxy/13D filings and ask whether RC Ventures has board/control rights or related-party exposure.

entity_name: Jeremy Allaire; Jim Breyer; Accel Partners; General Catalyst Partners
ownership_basis: Secondary profile identifies founder and seed backers; current post-IPO ownership percentages are not captured.
evidence_quote: $9 million Series A funding from Jim Breyer, Accel Partners, and General Catalyst Partners
rm_impact_reason: High-quality fintech/VC seed backing is commercially positive, but current public-company control requires S-1/proxy verification.
recommended_action: Collect Circle S-1/424B4 principal-stockholder table and distinguish founder ownership from institutional float.

ownership_basis: Secondary public profile lists Brian Armstrong as owner at 19%; primary proxy verification is required.
rm_impact_reason: Founder/CEO with large ownership can align strategy but also concentrates control-person and reputational exposure.
recommended_action: Verify beneficial ownership and voting power from the latest Coinbase proxy statement before updating KYC.

ownership_basis: Secondary profile reports IPO-era stake; current stake requires SEC verification.
rm_impact_reason: Co-founder/director equity is relevant for control-person screening but current economic exposure may have changed.
recommended_action: Collect latest director beneficial ownership and related-party data from Coinbase SEC filings.

ownership_basis: Secondary shareholder profile reports Class B share ownership; current proxy should verify exact voting power.
evidence_quote: Larry Page ... own 45% ... of class B shares
rm_impact_reason: Class B super-voting shares create founder control despite lower economic ownership, relevant for governance-risk context.
recommended_action: Verify Class B and total voting power in latest Alphabet proxy statement.

ownership_basis: Secondary shareholder profile reports Class B share ownership; current proxy should verify exact voting power.
evidence_quote: Sergey Brin ... own ... 42% of class B shares
rm_impact_reason: Class B super-voting shares create founder control despite lower economic ownership, relevant for governance-risk context.
recommended_action: Verify Class B and total voting power in latest Alphabet proxy statement.

ownership_percent: Vanguard 8.88% Class A / 7.64% Class C; BlackRock 7.36% Class A / 6.63% Class C
ownership_basis: Secondary shareholder profile reports public-share class holdings; voting influence differs by share class.
rm_impact_reason: Large passive institutional holders matter for governance context but do not usually imply operational control.
recommended_action: Treat as shareholder context, not beneficial-owner drift, unless filings show activism, concentrated voting, or related-party exposure.
